{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322041445A6182E16FB468B225CD4"}"},"total":249},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7297118332225635081","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看，文笔很好，一章都没跳过，之前看其它的好多综影视的，看了一点点就看不下去了，这个是真的很好看，所以的故事情节都能想象得到那个画面，作者大大，加油更啊[飞吻]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1698994060,"group_id":"7291494830293650488","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"只喜欢甜宠爽文，拒绝虐文","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8J9mBOf3tZxu77UQQpOF5sLAYPKyseqwWwAC8Q2FmCi","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a98252ad83b940bea58e09bdd39c79e0~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776701781&x-signature=l0BndITcMH2E1G5vZoDBoTUBANw%3D","user_id":"1042791458417854","user_name":"夏日的冬雪"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1042791458417854","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1656050825,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7291494830293650488","book_info":{"abstract":"「云之羽更新中」
「接档：一人之下」
云苓，魅药成精。
得天独厚的优势与风情使她一眼就被系统相中，拐去影视组替各路炮灰女配完成心愿，偶尔也会前往彩蛋世界攻略白月光男神。
【世界一】如懿传 高晞月 ✓
【世界二】莲花楼 cp李莲花 ✓
【世界三】我的人间烟火 cp孟宴臣 ✓
【世界四】步步惊心 明玉 ✓
【世界五】云之羽 cp宫尚角
【世界六】一人之下 柳妍妍
【世界七】甄嬛传 瓜尔佳文鸢
【世界八】云之羽 cp宫远徵
【世界九】星汉灿烂 王姈
【世界十】新还珠格格 含香

16hMjOc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.3738656e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322041445A6182E16FB468B225CD4"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":9,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":13738,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":14732},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7331581171184157502","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"女主是魅药成精，容貌绝美，体态婀娜，有点小性子，有一点点坏，性格多变，不同小世界之间有些差别。男主遇上女主后独宠，化身恋爱脑，看起来很好看。就是刚开始的小世界里男主一见钟情就开始无所顾忌的偏爱，节奏很快，特别爽，后面的小世界就有一个过程，慢慢沦陷的那种，有点落差感。
看完的几个小世界，还不错：
很狗的渣渣龙弘历，遇上有点小心机的高晞月，变成了守身如玉的男德班班长，贬福晋，搞太后，处处为她打算。
醉心弄权的康熙，遇上作精明玉，一边听她心声一边配合她演戏，步步沦陷，封她为后，并给幼子铺路。
热衷找纯元手办的大胖橘，遇上茶香四溢的江采蘋，被狠狠拿捏。","text_exts":[{"e":86,"s":82,"text":"一见钟情","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%B8%80%E8%A7%81%E9%92%9F%E6%83%85&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741240858B225CD4%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227331581171184157502%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227291494830293650488%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B8%80%E8%A7%81%E9%92%9F%E6%83%85%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1707020398,"group_id":"7291494830293650488","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"流年过，水飘零，风轻拂，人自寒。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/dRHPPMkbfrNK/j/64MOkw=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/cfd282af5093465ea6d9376429151ab7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776705274&x-signature=8AH%2FBeYrd9Rtfdh%2FA%2Fg2SjpvjBQ%3D","user_id":"75100808737","user_name":"流水轻寒"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"75100808737","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7291494830293650488","book_info":{"abstract":"「云之羽更新中」
